https://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/firewalls-pf.html

Under section 29.3.3.7 Network Hygiene:

The URL "http://www.openbsd.gr/faq/pf/scrub.html" is broken and a similar page no longer exists in the OpenBSD FAQ, so the sentence "Refer to http://www.openbsd.gr/faq/pf/scrub.html for more information." has been removed.
